your home?

Enter your suburb and get an instant AI feasibility check — council rules, costs, timeline, and who to call. No consultant needed.

to get your report
Free
feasibility check

KDR is complicated. We make it clear.

Every property is different. Every council has different rules. We cut through the complexity.

Every council has different rules

Heritage overlays, flood zones, minimum lot sizes — we've mapped them all.

No idea what it actually costs

Get realistic cost ranges based on your state, suburb, and house size.

Don't know how long it takes

From DA lodgement to handover — realistic timelines for your council.

Can't find the right builder

We connect you with KDR-specialist builders, town planners, and trades.

How it works

From question to action in minutes

STEP 1

Enter your suburb

Type your suburb or address. We cover all major councils across Australia.

STEP 2

AI analyses your block

We check council policy, heritage overlays, flood & bushfire zones, and zoning rules.

STEP 3

Get your feasibility report

Instant report: can you KDR, estimated costs, timeline, and next steps.

STEP 4

Connect with builders

We match you with verified builders, planners, and tradespeople in your area.

Ready to find out if you can rebuild?

Takes 2 minutes. No consultant. No guessing. Just enter your suburb.
